content.title: My First Note
content.description:
# Welcome to Markdown Notes!!

This is a note with **markdown** support.

## Features

- Write in markdown
- Link to other items using `item://` protocol
- Click Edit to modify

## Try It

Create another note and link to it like this:

`
[Link text](item://paste-item-id-here)
`

To get an item's ID, navigate to it and click "Copy ID" in the nav bar.

[Hobson](item://c3f4c6ad-e827-4999-bf22-724873a5aade#description?region=bootstrap)

[kernel-core](item://33333333-1111-0000-0000-000000000000#code?region=SEED_IDS)

You can also transclude items as shown here ![Hobson TODOs](item://e62219e1-939f-4955-a427-ce67016b9079) and they will be embedded.
